message:
web: Improve Write/Edit tool display with auto-expand and diff stats

- Auto-expand non-failed Write and Edit tool calls
- Hide line stats (+/-) for failed tool calls
- Add aggregated diff stats to sidebar using database values
- Use DiffViewer for Write tool to show proper green addition highlighting

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/upinnwq1ii

files.patch:
@@ -541,6 +541,9 @@ export async function getTranscriptWithAccess(db: DrizzleDB, viewerId: string, i
       updatedAt: transcripts.updatedAt,
       visibility: transcripts.visibility,
       sharedWithTeamId: transcripts.sharedWithTeamId,
+      linesAdded: transcripts.linesAdded,
+      linesRemoved: transcripts.linesRemoved,
+      linesModified: transcripts.linesModified,
       userName: user.name,
       userImage: user.image,
       repoName: repos.repo,
